scripts.build: panda codegen && tsr generate && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.make:assets: blender -b -P tools/blender/make_tetra.py -- --out public/assets/3d/ && blender -b -P tools/blender/bake_env.py -- --out public/assets/3d/ && blender -b -P tools/blender/make_record.py -- --out public/assets/3d/ && blender -b -P tools/blender/render_og.py -- --out public/ --name og-home && ffmpeg -v error -y -i public/assets/3d/record-grooves.png -c:v libwebp -q:v 80 public/assets/3d/record-grooves.webp && rm -f public/assets/3d/record-grooves.png && test -s public/assets/3d/tetra-wire-lo.glb && test -s public/assets/3d/studio-night.hdr && test -s public/assets/3d/record.glb
